initial_candidates.sql:
WITH yearly_top_causes AS (
    SELECT 
        case_ids.db_year,
        parties.oaf_violation_category,
        COUNT(parties.id) AS count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY case_ids.db_year ORDER BY COUNT(parties.id) DESC) AS rn
    FROM parties
    JOIN case_ids ON parties.case_id = case_ids.case_id
    GROUP BY case_ids.db_year, parties.oaf_violation_category
),
top_two_per_year AS (
    SELECT db_year, oaf_violation_category
    FROM yearly_top_causes
    WHERE rn <= 2
),
yearly_pairs AS (
    SELECT 
        db_year,
        GROUP_CONCAT(oaf_violation_category, ', ') AS top_causes
    FROM top_two_per_year
    GROUP BY db_year
),
distinct_pairs AS (
    SELECT 
        top_causes,
        COUNT(*) AS year_count
    FROM yearly_pairs
    GROUP BY top_causes
)
SELECT db_year
FROM yearly_pairs
WHERE top_causes IN (
    SELECT top_causes
    FROM distinct_pairs
    WHERE year_count = 1
);

WITH yearly_top_causes AS (
  SELECT 
    case_ids.db_year,
    parties.oaf_violation_category,
    COUNT(parties.id) AS count,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY case_ids.db_year ORDER BY COUNT(parties.id) DESC) AS rn
  FROM parties
  JOIN case_ids ON parties.case_id = case_ids.case_id
  GROUP BY case_ids.db_year, parties.oaf_violation_category
),
top_two_per_year AS (
  SELECT db_year, oaf_violation_category
  FROM yearly_top_causes
  WHERE rn <= 2
),
yearly_pairs AS (
  SELECT db_year, 
         GROUP_CONCAT(oaf_violation_category, ', ') AS top_causes
  FROM top_two_per_year
  GROUP BY db_year
),
distinct_pairs AS (
  SELECT top_causes, COUNT(*) AS num_years
  FROM yearly_pairs
  GROUP BY top_causes
  HAVING num_years = 1
)
SELECT db_year
FROM yearly_pairs
WHERE top_causes IN (SELECT top_causes FROM distinct_pairs);

WITH yearly_top_causes AS (
    SELECT 
        case_ids.db_year,
        parties.oaf_violation_category,
        COUNT(parties.id) AS count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY case_ids.db_year ORDER BY COUNT(parties.id) DESC) AS rn
    FROM parties
    JOIN case_ids ON parties.case_id = case_ids.case_id
    GROUP BY case_ids.db_year, parties.oaf_violation_category
),
top_two_per_year AS (
    SELECT db_year, oaf_violation_category
    FROM yearly_top_causes
    WHERE rn <= 2
),
year_pairs AS (
    SELECT 
        t1.db_year AS year1, 
        t2.db_year AS year2,
        t1.oaf_violation_category AS cause1,
        t2.oaf_violation_category AS cause2
    FROM top_two_per_year t1
    JOIN top_two_per_year t2 
        ON t1.db_year < t2.db_year
        AND t1.oaf_violation_category = t2.oaf_violation_category
),
all_year_pairs AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT year1 AS year FROM year_pairs
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT year2 AS year FROM year_pairs
)
SELECT db_year
FROM top_two_per_year
WHERE db_year NOT IN (SELECT year FROM all_year_pairs)
GROUP BY db_year;

aggregation.selected_sql:
WITH yearly_top_causes AS (
  SELECT 
    case_ids.db_year,
    parties.oaf_violation_category,
    COUNT(parties.id) AS count,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY case_ids.db_year ORDER BY COUNT(parties.id) DESC) AS rn
  FROM parties
  JOIN case_ids ON parties.case_id = case_ids.case_id
  GROUP BY case_ids.db_year, parties.oaf_violation_category
),
top_two_per_year AS (
  SELECT db_year, oaf_violation_category
  FROM yearly_top_causes
  WHERE rn <= 2
),
yearly_pairs AS (
  SELECT db_year, 
         GROUP_CONCAT(oaf_violation_category, ', ') AS top_causes
  FROM top_two_per_year
  GROUP BY db_year
),
distinct_pairs AS (
  SELECT top_causes, COUNT(*) AS num_years
  FROM yearly_pairs
  GROUP BY top_causes
  HAVING num_years = 1
)
SELECT db_year
FROM yearly_pairs
WHERE top_causes IN (SELECT top_causes FROM distinct_pairs);
